```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/claw-hive/src/blueprints/presets.ts", "packages/claw-hive/src/components/team9-staff-soul/default-soul.ts", "packages/claw-hive/src/components/team9-staff-soul/component.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/winrey/Projects/weightwave/team9-agent-pi && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TEAM9_PERSONAL_ASSISTANT_SOUL constant exists", "Team9StaffSoulComponent reads variant from config", "TEAM9_PERSONAL_STAFF_BLUEPRINT registered in defaultBlueprints"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — Extract StaffService Base Layer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract shared bot CRUD, claw-hive registration, and AI generation logic from CommonStaffService into reusable StaffService.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/staff.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.module.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/staff.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern=common-staff", "acceptanceCriteria": ["StaffService contains createBotWithAgent, updateBotAndAgent, deleteBotAndAgent, generatePersona, generateAvatar", "CommonStaffService delegates shared operations to StaffService", "All existing common-staff tests pass"]}
```

